---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps or a minimal command/snippet that triggers it:

```bash
bioamla ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include the full error / traceback).

## Environment

- bioamla version: <!-- `bioamla config version` -->
- Python version:
- OS:
- Install method: <!-- pip / uv / from source -->

## Additional context

Audio format/sample rate, model id, dataset, or anything else relevant.
